subject: [PATCH v6 18/22] memcg: swap: only charge physical swap slots

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel's memory cgroup (memcg) swap handling to only charge physical swap slots, rather than virtual ones. This change is made possible by the removal of zswap and zero-filled swap page optimization from using physical swap space. The patch also optimizes IDR lookups on hot paths by converting memcg swap charge/uncharge/clear APIs to take a struct mem_cgroup pointer directly. Additionally, it reduces IDR lookups in several functions, including vswap_alloc_swap_slot(), vswap_free(), and memcg1_swapin(). Overall, this patch aims to improve performance and accuracy of memory cgroup swap handling.
